title: Naked Acts
tagline: Cicely Has A Body Every Man Would Want & Any Woman Would Love… But There’s A Problem.
overview: An aspiring actress has lost considerable weight to land her first movie role, but what the director didn’t tell her was that it includes a nude scene. Reluctant to do it, she embarks on a personal journey that unveils secrets once hidden under her weight, as she discovers emotional nudity is just as revealing as taking her clothes off.
